text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I worked so hard all for this day, but I just wasn't
good enough...
choice_data_list: Let's build on your efforts for next time!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That's kind of you to say, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I may have lost, but I gave it my all out on the
track.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
What I need is the skill to claim first place. I'm
going to work even harder from now on!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's enough feeling sorry for myself! It's time to
set my sights on my next race!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: And for that, I need to train even harder!
